key.name: daily-step-goal
key.summary: Daily step goal shown on the Dashboard ring
key.description: Used to compute the activity ring's progress. 0 hides the goal.

key.name: water-goal-ml
key.description: Used to compute the water ring's progress. 0 hides the goal.

key.name: last-meal
key.summary: Meal tag last used on the food form

key.name: water-unit
key.summary: Display unit for the water form (ml or floz)

key.name: last-metric
key.summary: Measurement last logged from the reading form

key.name: sync-time-on-connect
key.summary: Push the host clock to a watch on every sync

key.name: background-sync-interval
key.summary: Minutes between background watch syncs (0 disables)

key.name: run-in-background
key.summary: Keep running (and syncing) when the window is closed

key.name: autostart-enabled
key.summary: Start in the background at login (via the portal)

key.name: weather-enabled
key.summary: Send a weather forecast to the watch on each sync
key.description: When enabled (and a location is set), Vitals fetches a forecast from Open-Meteo and stores it in the watch's weather database so the built-in Weather app can show it.

key.name: weather-location-name
key.summary: Display name of the configured weather location

key.name: weather-latitude
key.summary: Latitude of the configured weather location

key.name: weather-longitude
key.summary: Longitude of the configured weather location

key.name: usda-api-key
key.description: Personal key for the USDA food lookup; empty uses the rate-limited shared DEMO_KEY.

key.name: window-maximized
key.summary: Whether the window was maximised at last close
